message.content:
@startuml
title Package Vod Detail

package "STB" as stb {
  package "PackageVodDetail" as pvd
  package "VodProductManager" as vpm
}

participant "MBS" as mbs

pvd -> mbs: get package vod detail infos
activate mbs
mbs --> pvd: package vod detail infos
deactivate mbs

pvd -> vpm: getProductButtons(productList)
activate vpm
vpm --> pvd: product buttons
deactivate vpm

opt [getting Push for vod purchased]
  pvd -> mbs: purchasePush(offerId)
  activate mbs
  mbs --> pvd
  deactivate mbs

  pvd -> mbs: get user discount intofs
  activate mbs
  mbs --> pvd: discount/cash coupon, membership point
  deactivate mbs

  opt [vod product contains offerId]
    pvd -> mbs: get package vod detail infos
    activate mbs
    mbs --> pvd: package vod detail infos
    deactivate mbs

    pvd -> vpm: getProductButtons(productList)
    activate vpm
    vpm --> pvd: product buttons
    deactivate vpm
  end
end

pvd ..> mbs : get package vod detail infos
pvd ..> mbs : get user discounts

@enduml
